regime.label: RISK-OFF / MIXED
regime.summary: The Iran War dominates all asset classes. Oil surged to ~$112/bbl with USO +11.15% on Friday — the single largest daily energy move in months. The Joint Hormuz Protocol provided a partial offset, keeping equities from selling off hard (SPY +0.09%). The regime is transitioning from acute Geopolitical Shock toward sustained Inflationary pressure, with higher-for-longer rates now locked in.

positions.rationale: Gold correction = opportunity. Dual tailwind (geopolitical + inflation).
positions.name: iShares Gold Trust

positions.rationale: Thesis T-001 strongest. $1.8B institutional inflows. Crowding noted.
positions.name: Energy Select Sector SPDR

positions.rationale: Defensive equity. Pricing power in inflation.
positions.name: Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR

positions.rationale: Worst defensive sector. Drug pricing risk. Replaced by XLP.
positions.name: XLV

theses.name: Higher-for-Longer Rates
theses.notes: Max conviction. Oil inflation eliminates cuts.

actionable: **EXIT XLV Monday open** — Worst defensive sector. Drug pricing + losing RS. Proceeds to BIL.
**ADD XLE 3% Monday** — Thesis T-001 confirmed. Unless WTI gaps above $118 on open (delay if chasing parabolic).
**WATCH CPI April 10** — 3.5% consensus. Hot print = oil inflation fears confirmed, bonds sell, BIL/SHY validated. Cool print = regime shift risk.
**WATCH Hormuz Protocol** — If it holds, oil war premium compresses $10-15/bbl. CTA unwind would be violent. Maintain DBO at 5% (not chasing).
**MONITOR gold at $4,200** — IAU thesis invalidation level. Correction healthy but must hold. Below $4,200 (IAU ~$84) = exit.
risks: **CPI Hot Surprise (April 10)**: If CPI >4.0%, stagflation fears spike. VIX to 30+. Gold re-rallies. TLT crushed. Portfolio BENEFITS (energy + gold + cash).
**Hormuz Protocol Failure**: If shipping disrupted, WTI to $130+. Energy parabolic but portfolio too concentrated. Trigger: Add more BIL, trim DBO.

**Surprise De-escalation**: If Iran ceasefire, oil crashes $15-20/bbl in days. CTA unwind. XLE -8-10%. DBO hammered. Gold drops. Portfolio takes hit on 20% commodity weight. Hedge: Tight stops on DBO at $18.
